name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Golden Check Basket Bag
This basket-style handbag is eye-catching and stylish, blending practical functionality with an elegant silhouette. Adorned with fluorescent pink animal print embroidery throughout, the front is accented with a Christian Dior Paris logo to elevate the style. Spacious interior with a detachable matching zip pouch, and a detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Front accented with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable zip pouch with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 35 x 20.5 x 11 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and 1 card holder
